name: Sauerkraut Ham Balls
recipeIngredient: 1 can Sauerkraut, drained and chopped (16 oz.)
3/4 cup Plus 2 tbsp dry bread crumbs, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine ham, sauerkraut, onion and 2 tbsp of the bread crumbs.
2. In another bowl, combine cream cheese, parsley, mustard, garlic powder and pepper; stir into sauerkraut mixture.
3. Chill for at least 1 hour to overnight.
4. Shape into 3/4-inch balls; coat with flour.
5. In a small bowl, beat eggs and milk.
6. Dip ham balls into the egg mixture.
7. Then roll in the remaining bread crumbs.
8. Heat oil to 375°F in a deep-fat fryer or electric skillet; fry ham balls until golden brown. Drain.
Yield: 60 appetizers. Recipe can be made into larger balls and served as a main dish.
